reason: Agent QA-20260423-041434-ct8i successfully received message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and responded with "4", confirming basic agent communication functionality.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully, displaying sidebar with three agents and home page showing agent cards.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260423-041434-ct8i" in sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing message input field and agent configuration options.
Verified agent status - Status indicator displayed "idle" in top right corner of agent detail view.

Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message was typed into input field and sent by clicking Send button. Agent status changed to "working" and a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created.
Waited for response - Agent processed message and returned response in approximately 1 second (displayed as "Worked for 1s").
Verified response mentions "4" - Agent responded with exactly "4", the correct answer to the mathematical question. Response is clearly visible in the chat area.
